subcodes.first_line: O blessed leaf of the Sinai Tree, render thanks unto God that thou hast entered beneath His sheltering shade and come under the banner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه شجره سیناء شکر کن خدا را که در ظل ممدود داخل شدی و در تحت لواء
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @importance of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @education of children; moral education, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
